CustomField.description: Performance tier for the lead agency based on median NOI-to-DEIS duration from CEQ EIS Timeline data 2010–2024. Set by NEPA_Agency_Tier_Setter flow when nepa_record_owner_agency__c changes. Fast_and_Defensible = ≤18mo median; Slow_Scoping_Bottleneck = 19–42mo; Legally_Vulnerable = >30mo combined with high litigation loss rate.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Agency EIS scoping performance classification. Fast agencies reduce litigation exposure; Legally Vulnerable agencies should trigger enhanced record completeness review.
CustomField.label: Agency Performance Tier
